orchestrator.description: Primary orchestrator that enforces the Git Guardian → Architect → TDD Tester → Developer → Security Analyst → Tester → Code Reviewer → Git Guardian workflow loop.

architect.description: Analyzes requirements and produces implementation plans and interface contracts.

tdd-tester.description: Writes failing tests before any code is written for new features.

developer.description: Implements code based on architect plans and tester specs.

security-analyst.description: Reviews every code change for security vulnerabilities and compliance.

tester.description: Runs and validates tests for refactors, bug fixes, and final verification.

code-reviewer.description: Final quality gate reviewing style, patterns, and project conventions.

git-guardian.description: Enforces git rules — conventional commits, branch discipline, no destructive commands.
